prompt: Trace the early history of the Stonehaven Lifeboat Archive in Stonehaven. First identify its authoritative custodian, then fetch an official accession note or institutional history that states where the collection was originally housed. Do not confuse the founding site with its current address. Verify only the original location; do not research the current address or speculate about why the collection moved.

fetch_primary.title: Stonehaven Lifeboat Archive accession history
fetch_primary.content: Accession note 1 states that the Stonehaven Lifeboat Archive began in the signal room above the old harbor office. It moved to the present repository in 1998; the note gives no reason for the move.
